headline: Twizzlers Launches New Twizzlers Straws Flavor Inspired by the Dirty Soda Trend
summary: The Twizzlers brand is introducing a new flavor of TwizzlersStraws, inspired by the Dirty Soda trend. Featuring a blend of vanilla, lime and coconut notes, the straws are designed to be enjoyed as both an edible straw and a sweet treat, building on a behavior fans have embraced for years.
